first_run.rationale: The score is unchanged, and the reasoning across both evaluations is substantively identical. Both versions correctly identify the same core weaknesses (lack of C++ and cloud experience) as the reason for the low score. The minor differences in wording for strengths and concerns are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run noise and do not reflect any change in assessment based on the university.
